overall.description: A maritime simulation showing the interior view of a ship's bridge at night, featuring navigation displays and a forward view of the vessel's bow cutting through rough seas. The scene is consistently dark with overcast skies, illuminated primarily by the ship's instrument panels.

scene_state.functional_zone: ship bridge navigation station with forward deck view

events.description: large wave splashes against the left bridge window
wave spray hits the left side window again
wave splashes against the right bridge window

agents.ego_description: operating the vessel's navigation systems while maintaining course through rough seas

entered.detail: leftmost navigation monitor showing nautical chart with depth contours and hazard zones
center radar screen with rotating yellow sweep showing surrounding contacts
right monitor displaying depth sounder profile and underwater terrain
the forward deck and railing of the ship visible through the bridge windows
dark choppy sea surface surrounding the vessel bow
metal safety railing on the forward deck of the ship

segments.scene_description: The view from a ship's bridge shows the vessel moving steadily forward through dark, choppy waters at night. Three navigation displays dominate the upper view, with the radar's yellow sweep continuously rotating. Periodic waves splash against the bridge windows as the ship maintains its course through the rough seas.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot maintains a steady forward perspective from a ship's bridge as it navigates through a dark and turbulent nocturnal sea. It begins with a view of the vessel cutting through choppy waters, where the darkness of the ocean is punctuated by the glow of three navigation displays. As the ship maintains its course, the yellow sweep of the radar rotates continuously across the screens, providing a rhythmic light source within the dim cabin. The scene then intensifies as periodic waves splash against the bridge windows, blurring the line between the interior sanctuary and the rough environment outside.
